subcodes.first_line: The fire of self and passion hath afflicted most of the peoples of the earth and held them back from drawing nigh unto God, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نار نفس و هوی اکثر اهل ارض را مبتلا نموده و از تقرب بحق جل جلاله باز داشته
subcodes.subjects: @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
